coreMeaning.en: to decay or cause to decay, producing a foul smell
the process or state of rotting

coreMeaning.en: in the process of rotting; becoming putrid
decomposing, especially with a foul smell; very unpleasant
a violent attempt to seize power from a government

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: putsch→来自德语，政变/暴力夺权行动

coreMeaning.en: a gentle golf stroke to roll the ball into the hole

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: putt→高尔夫推杆轻击球入洞

coreMeaning.en: a long strip of cloth wound spirally around the leg as protection

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: puttee→来自印地语，士兵的绑腿带

coreMeaning.cn: 推杆；漫无目的地做事的人
coreMeaning.en: a golf club for putting; a person who potters about

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: putt(推杆)+er→用于推杆的球杆/做推杆的人

coreMeaning.cn: 闲晃了；漫无目的地忙碌（过去式）
coreMeaning.en: past tense of putter; occupied oneself in a desultory way
plural of putter; golf clubs for putting
present participle of put or putt
a soft pliable substance used for fixing glass in window frames

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: putty→put(放)+ty→填缝腻子，用于填充固定

coreMeaning.en: (informal) a stupid or worthless person; to waste time

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: putz→意第绪语借词，蠢人或无意义的行为

coreMeaning.en: a game or problem designed to test ingenuity; something confusing

coreMeaning.en: causing one to feel confused; perplexing
